profileSettings.dangerZoneDesc: Deactivation locks your profile and ends all sessions.
profileSettings.deleteHint: Deletes your account and all related data. If linked accounts exist, you’ll switch to the home feed; otherwise, you’ll go to the sign-in page.
profileSettings.notSignedInMessage: Please sign in to edit settings.

extraPassword.desc: When resetting the password, email or phone must also be confirmed.
extraPassword.title: Extra password protection

securityPage.notSignedInMessage: Please sign in to manage security options.

sessions.desc: Ends all active sessions on all devices and logs you out.
sessions.title: End sessions

securityPage.title: Security & access

twofa.intro: Protect your account with a second login step. Use app (TOTP), SMS or passkeys.
twofa.passkeyActiveMsg: Passkey is active. You can use it to log in.
twofa.passkeysActiveNote: Passkey is set up and stored for 2-step authentication.
twofa.passkeysNote: Set up a passkey for faster, safer sign-ins.
twofa.scanIntro: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.

sms.loginSendsToPrefix: At login, we send a code to

twofa.smsActiveMsg: Two-factor login via SMS is active.
twofa.smsAddPhoneFirst: Add a phone number in your profile settings first.
twofa.smsPhoneReady: Phone number saved. You can now set up SMS codes.
twofa.title: Two-factor authentication

account.desc: View and edit profile info (name, bio, avatar, banner), export data, and manage account options.
account.title: Your account

monetization.desc: From tips to communities. All paths to stable income.
monetization.title: Monetization

notifications.desc: Choose which activities, recommendations, and messages you want to be notified about.
notifications.title: Notifications

premium.desc: View benefits and manage your premium settings.
premium.title: Premium

privacy.desc: Control what you see and share, and adjust your privacy.
privacy.title: Privacy

security.desc: Check login security, manage connected apps, and monitor access.
security.title: Security & access
